title: My mental breakdown goes on
description: A port of my third mental breakdown on planet minecraft
body:
This is my third mental breakdown put into a resource pack, ported from planet minecraft! Enjoy my suffering in lovely anime girl form!


Some things it changes so the cute lil' mods don't get mad at me:


made swords a lil' shorter

added some pretty colours on the weapons, but not too much colour!

made the totem an anime girl for some reason. Credit to Ruzhai for the art.
